description: Fragment of a marriage contract (ketubba) containing a detailed description of part of a house given to the bribe. Mentioning the names Avraham b. Natan, Ḥalfon, and [...] b. Yaḥyā. On verso there is a faded medical recipe in Arabic script. (Information in part from Goitein's index card and CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
